name: customer-deck-builder
description: Build a branded, print-ready customer proposal / pitch deck from Diolog's 9-slide template system. Fills company-agnostic templates with a specific client's identity, contacts, pricing and numbers (prompting with multiple-choice questions for missing details), keeps the IR-proposal spine, and can design new slides into the same system via design-craft. Outputs a single self-contained web page with pan/zoom (trackpad + controls, fit-deck / fit-slide / 100%) that prints to a vertical, paged PDF at native 1920×1080 slide size.
